form.formComment: Yet to taste defeat in two starts. Last appeared won by a nose at Doncaster LR Flying Scotsman Stakes September 12 over 1400m defeating Hankelow carrying 58kg at $6.50. Must respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9.5). Yet to taste defeat in two starts. Last appeared won by a nose at Doncaster LR Flying Scotsman Stakes September 12 over 1400m defeating Hankelow carrying 58kg at $6.50. Must respect.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign second of 8 at Chantilly in the LR October 11 over 1400m, soft track; 1.3 len behind Dostoievsky with 58kg at $1.80. On debut 11th of 18 at Newbury May 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind Humidity with 60.5kg at $17. Will need to do even more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(8.5). He is resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign second of 8 at Chantilly in the LR October 11 over 1400m, soft track; 1.3 len behind Dostoievsky with 58kg at $1.80. On debut 11th of 18 at Newbury May 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind Humidity with 60.5kg at $17. Will need to do even more.

form.formComment: Colt returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation won by 1.3 len this track G3 Autumn Stakes October 11 over 1600m defeating Al Zanati carrying 58.5kg at $3.50. First up last campaign second of 8 at Doncaster in the LR Flying Scotsman Stakes September 12 over 1400m, a nose behind Avicenna carrying 58kg at $2.30. Looks a strong top-three prospect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(7). Colt returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation won by 1.3 len this track G3 Autumn Stakes October 11 over 1600m defeating Al Zanati carrying 58.5kg at $3.50. First up last campaign second of 8 at Doncaster in the LR Flying Scotsman Stakes September 12 over 1400m, a nose behind Avicenna carrying 58kg at $2.30. Looks a strong top-three prospect.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since winning by 0.5 len Doncaster G1 Futurity Trophy October 25 over 1600m in the wet defeating Action carrying 58.5kg at $4.60. On debut fifth of 10 at Curragh August 9 over 1408m, 4 len behind Geryon with 60.5kg at $4. Terrific chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Resuming. Not seen since winning by 0.5 len Doncaster G1 Futurity Trophy October 25 over 1600m in the wet defeating Action carrying 58.5kg at $4.60. On debut fifth of 10 at Curragh August 9 over 1408m, 4 len behind Geryon with 60.5kg at $4. Terrific chance again.

form.formComment: Puts an unbeaten record on the line. Returned last time out favourite; won by 1.5 len at Kempton Park All Weather February 25 over 1600m defeating Venetian Prince carrying 60.5kg at $1.30. Tough to beat on latest and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(10.5). Puts an unbeaten record on the line. Returned last time out favourite; won by 1.5 len at Kempton Park All Weather February 25 over 1600m defeating Venetian Prince carrying 60.5kg at $1.30. Tough to beat on latest and can measure up again.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last in a small field at Doncaster in the G1 Futurity Trophy October 25 over 1600m, in the wet; 23 len behind Hawk Mountain carrying 58.5kg at $3.80. On debut fifth of 12 at Newmarket (July) July 11 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Distant Storm with 58kg at $6. Others rate much better and prepared to risk.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). He is resuming after a six months break. Not seen since he finished last in a small field at Doncaster in the G1 Futurity Trophy October 25 over 1600m, in the wet; 23 len behind Hawk Mountain carrying 58.5kg at $3.80. On debut fifth of 12 at Newmarket (July) July 11 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Distant Storm with 58kg at $6. Others rate much better and prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 50 day let-up. First-up raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Southwell All Weather on January 17 over 1600m, nose behind Knowledge carrying 58.5kg at $1.20. Last start 2nd in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather on February 25 over 1600m, 1.75 len behind Hidden Force with 60.5kg at $6. Likely to find this out of reach.
